title: taraxacum ligerinum
intro: Taraxacum ligerinum, commonly known as the Lion's Tooth, is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum ligerinum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum ligerinum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
